title: sphaerostephanos simplicifolius
intro: Sphaerostephanos simplicifolius, also known as the Chinese shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine in the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in China, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sphaerostephanos simplicifolius are numerous, and it has been used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used internally or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
